message:
feat: add basic HTTP server with health endpoint

- Add Server struct with http.ServeMux router
- Implement /health endpoint returning "ok"
- Add Config struct for Port and LogDir settings
- Add DefaultConfig() helper function

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+package main
+
+import (
+	"net/http"
+	"net/http/httptest"
+	"testing"
+)
+
+func TestHealthEndpoint(t *testing.T) {
+	srv := NewServer(Config{Port: 8080, LogDir: "./test-logs"})
+
+	req := httptest.NewRequest("GET", "/health", nil)
+	w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+
+	srv.ServeHTTP(w, req)
+
+	if w.Code != http.StatusOK {
+		t.Errorf("expected status 200, got %d", w.Code)
+	}
+	if w.Body.String() != "ok" {
+		t.Errorf("expected body 'ok', got %q", w.Body.String())
+	}
+}
